data.body: 18f9 test contract: authoritative ticket description; in-process injected-runner tier for JSON parsing/fail-closed cases, deterministic fake-executable subprocess tier for default runner, supplementary live integration smoke. Preconditions: two-level language groups with Files entries; exact postcondition: repo-relative POSIX file map and max_loc; negative/error controls: missing binary, nonzero, empty stdout, invalid JSON; successful [] remains real zero result. RED evidence: 7/7 required nodes failed explicitly because analyzer is not implemented; live smoke skipped (scc absent).
